title: Fix Page Search Score=0.0 Under-Ranking
description:
Research Report R1-013 (Confidence 91%, High). Pages returned from MemorySmith search have Score=0.0, causing them to be systematically under-ranked compared to memory records — even when the page content is more relevant. This misleads planners and LLMs relying on search ordering.

Fix: Investigate why pages get Score=0.0 (likely the search endpoint doesn't compute BM25/semantic scores for pages). Either fix server-side or normalize client-side by assigning a default score or excluding zero-scored items from ranking.

Source: research-MemorySmith.Agent Sprint-35 Code Audit, Council Addendum 2026-06-26
